chunks.title: Yahweh's Promise to Cyrus
chunks.reason: A direct divine speech addressing Cyrus with promises of victory and recognition.

chunks.title: Cosmic Salvation and the Potter Analogy
chunks.reason: A poetic oracle calling for cosmic renewal followed by a rhetorical argument about God's sovereignty over creation.

chunks.title: Nations Submit to Israel
chunks.reason: A prophetic declaration that foreign nations will submit to Israel and acknowledge Yahweh.

chunks.title: The Uniqueness of Yahweh
chunks.reason: A theological argument contrasting the true God with idols, culminating in a call for universal submission.
